children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Not later than 3 years after the issuance of an order under , the Secretary shall conduct a referendum among qualified handlers required to pay assessments under the order, as provided in , subject to the voting requirements of subsection (b), to ascertain whether the order then in effect shall be continued.section 6803(b)(3) of this titlesection 6804(h)(1) of this title

children.heading: Approval of order needed
children.label: 2 Approval of order needed
children.text: The order shall be continued only if the Secretary determines that the order has been approved by a simple majority of all votes cast in the referendum. If the order is not approved, the Secretary shall terminate the order as provided in subsection (d).

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Each qualified handler eligible to vote in a referendum conducted under this section shall be entitled to cast 1 vote for each separate facility of the person that is an eligible separate facility, as defined in paragraph (2).

children.heading: Separate facility
children.label: A Separate facility
children.text: A handling or marketing facility of a qualified handler shall be considered to be a separate facility if the facility is physically located away from other facilities of the qualified handler or the business function of the facility is substantially different from the functions of other facilities owned or operated by the qualified handler.

children.heading: Eligibility
children.label: B Eligibility
children.text: A separate facility of a qualified handler shall be considered to be an eligible separate facility if the annual sales of cut flowers and cut greens to retailers and exempt handlers from the facility are $750,000 or more.

children.heading: Annual sales determined
children.label: C Annual sales determined
children.text: For the purpose of determining the amount of annual sales of cut flowers and cut greens under subparagraph (B), subparagraphs (A) and (C) of shall apply.section 6802(4) of this title

at the discretion of the Secretary, may conduct at any time a referendum of qualified handlers required to pay assessments under the order, as provided in , subject to the voting requirements of subsection (b), to ascertain whether qualified handlers favor suspension or termination of the order; andsection 6804(h)(1) of this title

if requested by the PromoFlor Council or by a representative group comprising 30 percent or more of all qualified handlers required to pay assessments under the order, as provided in , shall conduct a referendum of all qualified handlers required to pay assessments under the order, as provided in , subject to the voting requirements of subsection (b), to ascertain whether qualified handlers favor suspension or termination of the order.section 6804(h)(1) of this titlesection 6804(h)(1) of this title
not later than 180 days after the referendum, suspend or terminate, as appropriate, collection of assessments under the order; and
suspend or terminate, as appropriate, activities under the order as soon as practicable and in an orderly manner.

children.heading: Manner of conducting referenda
children.label: e Manner of conducting referenda
children.text: Referenda under this section shall be conducted in such manner as is determined appropriate by the Secretary.
